nodes.name: 皮拉茹 (巴西)
nodes.summary: 皮拉茹 (巴西)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Rufous casiornis、Pale-breasted spinetail，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Pale-breasted spinetail
nodes.summary: Pale-breasted spinetail（Pale-breasted spinetail，学名 Synallaxis albescens），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于皮拉茹 (巴西)。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The pale-breasted spinetail (Synallaxis albescens) is a passerine bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Costa Rica, Panama, Trinidad, and in every mainland South American country except Chile and Ecuador.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C
